name: ersinbinal-site-tools
description: Convivium GitHub Pages site: terminal UI, articles, games, PWA assets, Supabase helpers, and Oracle Worker tooling.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:site
scripts.check:syntax: node --check service-worker.js && node --check workers/oracle/src/index.js && node --check assets/js/home-protocol.js && node --check assets/js/home/pipe-90.js && node --check assets/js/home/outrun-86.js && node --check assets/js/home/screen-saver.js && node --check assets/js/home/presence.js
scripts.test: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:e2e
